---
id: get-vrm-bone
title: "Get a VRM bone entity"
description: "Retrieve the entity ID for a specific bone of the VRM model."

<Heading
  as={"h1"}
  className={"openapi__heading"}
  children={"Get a VRM bone entity"}
>
</Heading>

<MethodEndpoint
  method={"get"}
  path={"/vrm/{entity_id}/bone/{bone_name}"}
  context={"endpoint"}
>
  
</MethodEndpoint>



Retrieve the entity ID for a specific bone of the VRM model.

  as={"h2"}
